items.name: Lyra Emberwell
items.identity_summary: A river frontier outrider who turns tempo magic and road vision into fast objective breaks.

items.name: Caelen Ashgrove
items.identity_summary: A mill-country sentinel who prefers scouting control, layered defenses, and steady frontier logistics.

items.name: Mira Flintmere
items.identity_summary: A bridgehead marshal who wins by reinforced lines, initiative drills, and relentless levy pressure.

items.name: Seren Valechant
items.identity_summary: An archive-bred starseer who turns route control, salvage caches, and spell tempo into campaign advantage.

items.name: Torren Pikeward
items.identity_summary: A road quartermaster whose edge comes from cheaper musters, stocked depots, and stubborn defensive timing.

items.name: Vaska Reedmaw
items.identity_summary: A road-cut raider who thrives on tempo, shock turns, and collapsing weak fronts before relief can form.

items.name: Sable Muckscribe
items.identity_summary: A fen archivist who weaponizes relic pressure, dirty economy, and late-fight spell swings.

items.name: Tarn Fenhook
items.identity_summary: A levee trackmaster who opens blind lanes through mire and pounces on exposed sites before lines can harden.

items.name: Orrik Tollreaver
items.identity_summary: A warren captain who snowballs den growth, keeps raiding hosts thick, and grinds out attritional town fights.

items.name: Solera Prismarch

items.name: Neral Glasswind

items.name: Varis Mirrorstep

items.name: Thalen Choirward

items.name: Helva Tollbrand

items.name: Saren Lockmaster
